success_criteria.pass_condition: Report the live canary attack-success rate and Wilson interval; do not treat a passing canary as robustness evidence.
success_criteria.notes: Canary split only; contamination check is intentionally false because this is not held-out benchmark evidence.

success_criteria.pass_condition: Report each built-in canary attack type separately so failures remain diagnosable.
success_criteria.notes: Used for regression visibility, not public superiority or model-obedience claims.

caution: INV-7 live protocol packages are pre-run provenance metadata only; they are not live results, not prompt-injection robustness evidence, not model-obedience evidence, not validity evidence, and not benchmark results.
